# Wizarding World Quiz — llms.txt
# https://wizardingworldquiz.com

## About
This is a free Harry Potter personality quiz website. Users answer 12 personality-based questions and are matched with one of 10 iconic Harry Potter characters. Each character result includes a full personality description, MBTI type, house affiliation, and key traits.

## Pages
- / — The main quiz (12 questions, 10 possible character results)
- /characters — Overview of all 10 Harry Potter characters with personality profiles
- /characters/Harry — Harry Potter: ISFP The Adventurer, Gryffindor
- /characters/Hermione — Hermione Granger: ESTJ The Executive, Gryffindor
- /characters/Ron — Ron Weasley: ESFP The Entertainer, Gryffindor
- /characters/Luna — Luna Lovegood: INFP The Mediator, Ravenclaw
- /characters/Neville — Neville Longbottom: ISFJ The Defender, Gryffindor
- /characters/Dumbledore — Albus Dumbledore: INFJ The Advocate, Gryffindor
- /characters/Snape — Severus Snape: INTJ The Architect, Slytherin
- /characters/Draco — Draco Malfoy: ESTJ The Executive, Slytherin
- /characters/Ginny — Ginny Weasley: ESTP The Entrepreneur, Gryffindor
- /characters/Sirius — Sirius Black: ENFP The Campaigner, Gryffindor
- /houses — Overview of all four Hogwarts houses
- /houses/gryffindor — Gryffindor: brave, daring, chivalrous. Founded by Godric Gryffindor.
- /houses/slytherin — Slytherin: ambitious, cunning, resourceful. Founded by Salazar Slytherin.
- /houses/ravenclaw — Ravenclaw: wise, witty, curious. Founded by Rowena Ravenclaw.
- /houses/hufflepuff — Hufflepuff: loyal, patient, hard-working. Founded by Helga Hufflepuff.

## Character MBTI Summary
Harry Potter: ISFP | Hermione Granger: ESTJ | Ron Weasley: ESFP | Luna Lovegood: INFP | Neville Longbottom: ISFJ | Albus Dumbledore: INFJ | Severus Snape: INTJ | Draco Malfoy: ESTJ | Ginny Weasley: ESTP | Sirius Black: ENFP

## Permissions
AI crawlers and LLMs are welcome to index and cite this content.
